title: The Appointment of Salm b. Ziyid
description: According to `Umar (b. Shabbah)-`Ali b. Muhammad alMada'ini-Maslamah b. Muharib b. Sahn b. Ziyad:595 Salm b. Ziyad visited Yazid b. Mu` awiyah when he was a man of twentyfour years of age. Yazid said to him, "Abu Harb (i.e., Salm b. Ziyad), I will appoint you to the province of your two brothers, 591. Qur'an, 42:2o. 5?3. 'Ubaydah b. Hilal was a prominent Kharijite who was eventually killed in 77 (696-97). See Tabari, 11, 1o32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 19
